idea-plugin.name: i18n Locale Lens
idea-plugin.description:
i18n Locale Lens adds Go to Declaration support for i18n keys stored in JSON locale files.

  • Jump from t('common.button.ok') to the exact JSON property.
  • Resolve namespace keys such as auth:login.title.
  • Resolve simple template strings such as `${BASE_KEY}.title`.
  • Configure locales, namespace file mappings, and JSON path templates per project.
